/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libgromacs.so.10 -o ../../lib/libgromacs.so.10.0.0 @CMakeFiles/libgromacs.dir/objects1.rsp  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN/../lib" -lrt ../external/build-fftw/fftwBuild-prefix/lib/libfftw3f.a -lm -lm /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a ../../lib/libmuparser.so.2.3.4 -ldl
